channel.title: GitHub Batchfile Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Batchfile in GitHub

item.title: WindowsAddict/IDM-Activation-Script
item.description: An open source tool to activate and reset trial of Internet Download Manager

item.title: massgravel/Microsoft-Activation-Scripts
item.description: A Windows and Office activator using HWID / Ohook / KMS38 / Online KMS activation methods, with a focus on open-source code and fewer antivirus detections.

item.title: lstprjct/IDM-Activation-Script
item.description: IDM Activation & Trail Reset Script

item.title: badafans/better-cloudflare-ip
item.description: 查找适合自己当前网络环境的优选cloudflare anycast IP

item.title: lxgw/LxgwWenKai
item.description: An open-source Chinese font derived from Fontworks' Klee One. 一款开源中文字体，基于 FONTWORKS 出品字体 Klee One 衍生。

item.title: ionuttbara/windows-defender-remover
item.description: A tool which is uses to remove Windows Defender in Windows 8.x, Windows 10 (every version) and Windows 11.

item.title: shuhongfan/NavicatCracker
item.description: navicat 激活 Navicat所有版本破解 A keygen for Navicat 16 Navicat16破解 Navicat Keygen Navicat 16 Keygen注册机(NavicatCracker) Navicat 16 破解 Navicat Premium 16 破解 Navicat破解 绿色版 MySQL

item.title: enhorse/java-interview
item.description: Вопросы и ответы к интервью Java разработчика

item.title: Trixarian/NetherSX2-classic
item.description: NetherSX2 based on AetherSX2 3668

item.title: blibdoolpoolp/Cloudflared-RDP-Tutorial-Free
item.description: This tutorial offers a comprehensive guide on setting up secure Remote Desktop (RDP) & SSH connections using Cloudflare's Cloudflared service. This tutorial aims to provide users with a method to access their desktops remotely without compromising security, leveraging Cloudflare's tunneling technology to create a safe, encrypted connection path.

item.title: minigueimeiros/office-365-cmd
item.description: Ativador Office 365

item.title: ahtihska/SpotifyPremium
item.description: Desktop MOD (ad free)

item.title: realpython/python-guide
item.description: Python best practices guidebook, written for humans.

item.title: pankoza2-pl/malwaredatabase-old
item.description: This repo contains live malware samples. Be careful with them or you can lose all your data! For educational purposes only! This repo is a old mess I know. This repo will be archived and not updated anymore

item.title: Zusyaku/Malware-Collection-Part-2
item.description: My Malware Collection From Internet "Dont Run In Real PC"

item.title: SlejmUr/Manifest_Tool_TB
item.description: Throwback Manifest Tool

item.title: kellwinr/galaxybook_mask
item.description: This script will allow you to mimic your windows pc as a Galaxy Book laptop, this is usually used to bypass Samsung Notes

item.title: LintangWisesa/Microsoft_Office_2016_Activator
item.description: A simple batch file to activate Microsoft Office 2016

item.title: saranrajmcse/WIN10RDP
item.description: create a Windows 10 RDP with ngrok

item.title: VirtualHotBar/HotPEToolBox
item.description: 一个纯净、强大、优雅的WinPE

item.title: zkteco-home/redis-windows
item.description: Native port of Redis for Windows,it can be installed as service.

item.title: vishnu1001/office-2021
item.description: Microsoft Office 2021 Activator 🤫
